summary: Iteration 18 - Buzz Score Dynamic Pricing Features Testing Complete. All features working correctly. Fixed bug where team panel wasn't showing price change indicators.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/weekly-price-reset - Updates prices based on buzz scores, stores previous_week_price
GET /api/admin/price-change-preview - Returns projected price changes without modifying data
Celebrity search API returns previous_week_price field
Category celebrities API returns previous_week_price for celebrities that have been through weekly reset
Multiple categories (movie_stars, athletes, royals) return previous_week_price
Hot celebs endpoint returns prices with tier information
Prices stay within tier ranges (A: £9-12M, B: £5-8M, C: £2-4M, D: £0.5-1.5M)
Team celebrities include previous_week_price when added
Price change calculation works correctly (current vs previous_week_price)
Celebrity cards show price change indicator (+X% in green for up, -X% in red for down)
Hot celebs ticker shows prices with up arrows
Search result floating modal shows price change indicator
Team panel shows price changes for added celebrities (FIXED)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed add_to_team endpoint to include previous_week_price in TeamCelebrity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buzz score dynamic pricing is fully implemented. Key components: get_dynamic_price() calculates prices based on tier and buzz_score. weekly_price_reset endpoint stores current price as previous_week_price before updating. PriceChangeIndicator component in CelebrityCard.jsx and TeamPanel.jsx shows green +X% for increases, red -X% for decreases. Hot celebs banner shows prices with up arrows. Fixed bug in add_to_team endpoint - now includes previous_week_price when adding celebrity to team.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Team panel was not showing price change indicators
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: add_to_team endpoint in server.py was not including previous_week_price when creating TeamCelebrity object
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added previous_week_price=celebrity.get('previous_week_price', 0.0) to TeamCelebrity constructor in add_to_team endpoint

features_verified.price_change_indicator_on_celebrity_card: Working - Shows +X% in green or -X% in red
features_verified.admin_weekly_price_reset: Working - POST /api/admin/weekly-price-reset updates prices based on buzz scores
features_verified.previous_week_price_in_api: Working - Celebrity API responses include previous_week_price after weekly reset
features_verified.search_modal_price_indicator: Working - Floating modal shows price change indicator
features_verified.team_panel_price_changes: Working (FIXED) - Team panel shows price changes for added celebrities
features_verified.hot_celebs_ticker_prices: Working - Shows prices with up arrows
